items.question: Do you deliver IMF/AS-11/DCP?
items.answer: Yes. We create and QC IMF packages, AS-11 DPP files, ProRes masters, and DCPs per spec with leader/slates and reports.

items.question: Dolby Vision / Atmos?
items.answer: HDR10 and Dolby Vision grading available depending on source and delivery. For Atmos, we book a certified mix stage with trusted partners.

items.question: Security?
items.answer: We use NDAs, watermarking, role-based access, checksum logs, and secure drives. Clean rooms available on request.

items.question: Turnaround for a 30-60 min episode?
items.answer: Typical 5-9 days for conform, SDR grade, stereo/5.1 mix, captions, and one delivery format (IMF or AS-11). Rush available.
